original_question:
A class of 48 students went on a spring outing to row boats at West Lake in Hangzhou. Each small boat can accommodate 3 people and costs 16 yuan to rent, while each large boat can accommodate 5 people and costs 24 yuan to rent. Calculate the minimum amount of rental fee the class has to spend.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
